languages.text: "Если мы будем знать, где и когда будут появляться Погонщицы, и тем более сможем выманивать их в удобное для нас место... Нет ничего, что устояло бы перед точным попаданием орбитального лэнс-орудия, Лорд-капитан. Есть у одного капитана Имперского флота передо мной должок, думаю он сможет расквартировать на орбите судно, пригодное для наших целей за скромную плату".

traits.locale_text: "Если мы будем знать, где и когда будут появляться Погонщицы, и тем более сможем выманивать их в удобное для нас место... Нет ничего, что устояло бы перед точным попаданием орбитального лэнс-орудия, Лорд-капитан. Есть у одного капитана Имперского флота передо мной должок, думаю он сможет расквартировать на орбите судно, пригодное для наших целей за скромную плату".

languages.text: "If we can know where and when the Drovers will emerge and can lure them to a location of our choosing… Nothing can withstand a precise orbital strike from a lance battery, Lord Captain. There is a certain Imperial Navy captain who owes me a favour. I believe he could station a vessel in orbit suitable for our purposes, at a modest price."
languages.original_text: "Если мы будем знать, где и когда будут появляться Погонщицы, и тем более сможем выманивать их в удобное для нас место... Нет ничего, что устояло бы перед точным попаданием орбитального лэнс-орудия, Лорд-капитан. Есть у одного капитана Имперского флота передо мной должок, думаю он сможет расквартировать на орбите судно, пригодное для наших целей за скромную плату".

traits.locale_text: "If we knew where and when the Drovers would emerge, and could lure them to a location of our choosing, then nothing could withstand a precise strike from an orbital lance battery, Lord Captain. There is a certain Imperial Navy captain who owes me a favour. I believe he could station a vessel in orbit suitable for our purposes, at a modest price."

"If we can know where and when the Drovers will emerge and can lure them to a location of our choosing… Nothing can withstand a precise orbital strike from a lance battery, Lord Captain. There is a certain Imperial Navy captain who owes me a favour. I believe he could station a vessel in orbit suitable for our purposes, at a modest price."
"If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."

"If we knew where and when the Drovers would emerge, and could lure them to a location of our choosing, then nothing could withstand a precise strike from an orbital lance battery, Lord Captain. There is a certain Imperial Navy captain who owes me a favour. I believe he could station a vessel in orbit suitable for our purposes, at a modest price."

"If we can know where and when the Drovers will emerge and can lure them to a location of our choosing… Nothing can withstand a precise orbital strike from a lance battery, Lord Captain. There is a certain Imperial Navy captain who owes me a favour. I believe he could station a vessel in orbit suitable for our purposes, at a modest price."

languages.text: 「もしこの敵の出現場所と時間、そして誘導方法が分かれば、軌道上のランスの直撃は、何にも止められないでしょう、艦長」
languages.original_text: "If we know where and when this thing will appear, and we also know how to lure it to a convenient location... There is nothing that can withstand a direct hit from an orbital lance, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: 「もしこの敵の出現場所と時間、そして誘導方法が分かれば、軌道上のランスの直撃は、何にも止められないでしょう、艦長」

languages.text: «Si podemos averiguar dónde y cuándo aparecerán los Pastores y conseguimos llevarlos hasta una ubicación concreta... Nada puede sobrevivir al asalto preciso de una batería de lanzas desde la órbita, Lord Capitán. Cierto capitán de la Armada Imperial me debe un favor. Creo que podría colocar una nave en una órbita favorable para este propósito por un módico precio».
languages.original_text: "If we can know where and when the Drovers will emerge and can lure them to a location of our choosing… Nothing can withstand a precise orbital strike from a lance battery, Lord Captain. There is a certain Imperial Navy captain who owes me a favour. I believe he could station a vessel in orbit suitable for our purposes, at a modest price."

traits.locale_text: «Si podemos averiguar dónde y cuándo aparecerán los Pastores y conseguimos llevarlos hasta una ubicación concreta... Nada puede sobrevivir al asalto preciso de una batería de lanzas desde la órbita, Lord Capitán. Cierto capitán de la Armada Imperial me debe un favor. Creo que podría colocar una nave en una órbita favorable para este propósito por un módico precio».

languages.text: “如果我们能掌握拒生花现身的时间和地点，再将其引诱至我们选定的位置……舰长大人，没有任何存在能扛得住光矛的精确打击。我恰好认识一位欠我人情的帝国海军上尉。我相信，只需支付一笔合理的报酬，他就能在轨道上部署一艘舰船，为我们执行这次行动。”
languages.original_text: "If we can know where and when the Drovers will emerge and can lure them to a location of our choosing… Nothing can withstand a precise orbital strike from a lance battery, Lord Captain. There is a certain Imperial Navy captain who owes me a favour. I believe he could station a vessel in orbit suitable for our purposes, at a modest price."

traits.locale_text: “如果我们能掌握拒生花现身的时间和地点，再将其引诱至我们选定的位置……舰长大人，没有任何存在能扛得住光矛的精确打击。我恰好认识一位欠我人情的帝国海军上尉。我相信，只需支付一笔合理的报酬，他就能在轨道上部署一艘舰船，为我们执行这次行动。”

languages.text: "Wenn wir wissen, wann und wo die Treiber kommen, können wir sie an einen Ort unserer Wahl locken ... gegen einen präzisen Orbitalangriff einer Lanzenbatterie ist kein Kraut gewachsen, Lord Captain. Ich kenne da einen Captain der imperialen Kriegsflotte, der mir einen Gefallen schuldet. Ich glaube, er könnte zu einem moderaten Preis ein Schiff im Orbit in Stellung bringen, das für unsere Zwecke geeignet ist."
languages.original_text: "If we can know where and when the Drovers will emerge and can lure them to a location of our choosing… Nothing can withstand a precise orbital strike from a lance battery, Lord Captain. There is a certain Imperial Navy captain who owes me a favour. I believe he could station a vessel in orbit suitable for our purposes, at a modest price."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn wir wissen, wann und wo die Treiber kommen, können wir sie an einen Ort unserer Wahl locken ... gegen einen präzisen Orbitalangriff einer Lanzenbatterie ist kein Kraut gewachsen, Lord Captain. Ich kenne da einen Captain der imperialen Kriegsflotte, der mir einen Gefallen schuldet. Ich glaube, er könnte zu einem moderaten Preis ein Schiff im Orbit in Stellung bringen, das für unsere Zwecke geeignet ist."

languages.text: "Çobanların nerede ve ne zaman ortaya çıkacaklarını bilebilirsek ve onları seçtiğimiz bir yere çekebilirsek... Hiçbir şey, bir mızrak bataryasından gelecek isabetli bir yörünge bombardımanına karşı koyamaz Lord Kaptan. Bana bir iyilik borcu olan bir İmparatorluk Donanması kaptanı var. Bence makul bir fiyata amaçlarımıza uygun bir gemiyi yörüngeye yerleştirebilir."
languages.original_text: "If we can know where and when the Drovers will emerge and can lure them to a location of our choosing… Nothing can withstand a precise orbital strike from a lance battery, Lord Captain. There is a certain Imperial Navy captain who owes me a favour. I believe he could station a vessel in orbit suitable for our purposes, at a modest price."

traits.locale_text: "Çobanların nerede ve ne zaman ortaya çıkacaklarını bilebilirsek ve onları seçtiğimiz bir yere çekebilirsek... Hiçbir şey, bir mızrak bataryasından gelecek isabetli bir yörünge bombardımanına karşı koyamaz Lord Kaptan. Bana bir iyilik borcu olan bir İmparatorluk Donanması kaptanı var. Bence makul bir fiyata amaçlarımıza uygun bir gemiyi yörüngeye yerleştirebilir."

languages.text: « Si nous pouvons prédire où et quand les Chasseurs surgiront, puis les attirer là où nous le souhaitons... Rien ne peut résister à une frappe orbitale chirurgicale d'une batterie de lances, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. J'ai en tête un capitaine de la Marine Impériale qui me doit un service. Moyennant finance, il serait sans doute disposé à positionner un vaisseau en orbite à ces fins précises. »
languages.original_text: "If we can know where and when the Drovers will emerge and can lure them to a location of our choosing… Nothing can withstand a precise orbital strike from a lance battery, Lord Captain. There is a certain Imperial Navy captain who owes me a favour. I believe he could station a vessel in orbit suitable for our purposes, at a modest price."

J'ai en tête un capitaine de la Marine Impériale qui me doit un service. Moyennant finance, il serait sans doute disposé à positionner un vaisseau en orbite à ces fins précises. »
